briefing.incidentSummary:
A local restaurant received 47 five-star reviews in a single night — all from accounts created that same day.

A rival restaurant owner is suspected of running a fake review campaign to boost their own ratings while filing false complaints to pull down the victim's listing.

The accounts all trace back to the same device.
briefing.missionText:
Your Mission:

› Identify who created the fake accounts

› Link the accounts to a single device

› Collect at least 3 correct evidences

› Flag the right suspect

suspects.name: Suresh K
suspects.profileNotes: All 47 fake accounts were created from IP 103.24.56.88 registered to Spice Garden Restaurant's broadband connection. Device fingerprint matches Suresh K's tablet.

suspects.name: Meera J
suspects.profileNotes: Left a single negative review from her personal account. Verified human account, not part of the fake campaign.

suspects.name: Unknown Agency
suspects.profileNotes: No consistent device fingerprint. Accounts show different browser agents unlike the fake campaign which had identical fingerprints.

items.label: fake_accounts_creation_log.csv
items.detail: 47 accounts created between 11:02 PM and 1:58 AM. All from IP 103.24.56.88. All accounts use the same email pattern: randomname+number@tempmail.com.

items.label: device_fingerprint_report.txt
items.detail: All 47 accounts share identical browser fingerprint: Android 13, Chrome 118, screen resolution 1280x800 — matching Suresh K's registered tablet SURESH-TAB-01.

hiddenItem.label: ip_registration_record.txt
hiddenItem.detail: IP 103.24.56.88 is registered to a broadband account under 'Spice Garden Hospitality Pvt Ltd' — owned by Suresh K. Confirms the fake campaign originated from his restaurant.

minigame.title: Decode ISP Record
minigame.hint: Caesar shift -3. What business name is this?
hints: It is a restaurant name — two words.

onSuccess.message: ip_registration_record.txt is now available in your file feed.

items.label: Account Creation Timing
items.detail: Accounts were created in automated bursts — one every 3.6 minutes on average. This is consistent with a script or manual tab-switching, not organic user behavior.

items.label: IP Geolocation
items.detail: IP 103.24.56.88 geolocates to the commercial district of Koramangala — same block as Spice Garden Restaurant.

items.label: Single Origin IP
items.detail: All 47 accounts originate from one IP — 103.24.56.88. No proxy or VPN masking. The attacker made no attempt to hide their origin.

timeline.title: Victim Notices
timeline.description: Restaurant owner sees suspicious review spike

perfect.title: Case Solved!
perfect.subtitle: Suresh K exposed as the fake review fraudster.
perfect.label: CASE CLOSED

wrongAccusation.title: Wrong Suspect
wrongAccusation.subtitle: The real culprit was Suresh K.
wrongAccusation.label: CASE FAILED

aria.welcomeToHub:
...47 glowing five-star reviews. All fake. All from one night.
Someone wanted to win badly enough to cheat.
Find them.
aria.exploreFeeds:
Device fingerprints. IP logs. Account metadata.
The trail is wider than you think.
aria.viewEvidence: One IP. 47 accounts. That's not a coincidence.
aria.decryptionHint:
The business name is hidden in the ISP record.
Decode it.
aria.flagSuspect:
A trace is forming.
You're on to something — keep pulling the thread.
More fragments remain. Don't stop now.
